author: kclowes
content: I just merged support for block tags in eth_getLogs, (https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/785) and eth_baseFee (https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/795)

author: boma_naps
content:
Hello <@1345762296873619456> <@628018527470616606> ,

We have this PR for `add fillTransaction`, which drops the `raw` field as per your request here: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/issues/508#issuecomment-4380914492.

Could you please review this PR: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/803 so we can be sure the current state addresses your concerns properly?
